     The Numbers Business Report

Almost Christmas (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $42,065,185Details
International Box Office $428,321
Worldwide Box Office $42,493,506
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,733,875
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $990,888
Total $3,724,763
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The festive story of a beloved patriarch who asks his family for one gift this holiday season: to get along. If they can honor that wish and spend five days under the same roof without killing one another, it will be a Christmas miracle.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$15,134,235 (36.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.78 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:99.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$17,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,376 opening theaters/2,379 max. theaters, 4.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $58,156,852

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 11th, 2016 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: November 25th, 2016 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: January 24th, 2017 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for suggestive material, drug content and language.
(Rating bulletin 2421 (Cert #50398), 4/20/2016)
Running Time: 107 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble
Plot point: African Americans, Divorcée Romance, Dysfunctional Family, Generational Conflict, Romance, Widow/Widower
Release detail: Christmas in November
Social setting: Christmas, Family Reunion
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Universal Pictures, Will Packer Productions, Perfect World Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
